DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDataTypeConversion workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source data type id to resolve.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Target data type system when the source type has mappings to several target systems.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDataTypeConversion workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
